---
title: "Our paper in Survey Methodology"
author: "Andrés Gutiérrez"
date: "2015-01-23"
categories:
  - "Estadística"
  - "Stats"
---

As a result of a comprehensive research about gross flows and survey sampling, we have been published in Survey Methodology. [The paper presents](http://www.statcan.gc.ca/pub/12-001-x/2014002/article/14113-eng.pdf) a new methodology for the proper estimation of gross flows when using complex samples.
